sections.heading: What is CSS Introduction & Selectors?
sections.body: How CSS works, selectors, specificity, and the cascade. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
CSS Introduction & Selectors is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind CSS Introduction & Selectors is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use CSS Introduction & Selectors every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most CSS Introduction & Selectors implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding CSS Introduction & Selectors is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.
